rows.content: When loading data delimited records from normal DOS text files, EDIT
examines the length of each variable length record. If it is the
longest record read, the maximum record length allowed is
automatically increased up to the limit set here by MAX RECORD LENGTH.
RECENT EDIT DEPTH+  This field allows you to configure the number
of files that will be added to your Recent Edit list (Panel 3.H).
By default, this value is 16, since that is the number of files
that can be displayed on a selection list on a 25 line screen.
However, this number may be changed from 1 to 99.
SYNTAX COLORIZATION+  Specifies whether program source should be colorized
or not. This is a global setting. In addition to enabling colorization
here, it is also necessary to bind a large colorization language file
(.CLR) to a particular file type and set a color scheme which define
which colors apply to the different classes of language elements. See
"Program Source Colorization" on page 7-1 for a full description of
